name: Deschiderea Anderssen
description: A rare, passive opening. White gives up the initiative.

name: Deschiderea Grob
description: Aggressive but risky opening. Weakens the kingside.

name: Deschiderea Larsen
description: Fianchetto on the queenside. Controls the long diagonal.
strategy: Pressure on the a1-h8 diagonal, positional play.

name: Deschiderea Bird
description: Aggressive control on the f-file. Similar to a reversed Dutch Defense.
strategy: Attack on the kingside, control of e5.

name: Deschiderea Réti
description: Hypermodern opening. Controls the center from a distance.
strategy: Fianchetto, indirect control of the center.

name: Réti - Varianta Indiană Regelui
description: Flexible setup. Can transpose into many structures.
strategy: King's Indian Attack, pressure on the center.

name: Deschiderea Engleză
description: The third most popular opening. Controls the d5 square.
strategy: Positional play, control of light squares.

name: Engleză - Varianta Agincourt
description: Black allows White flexibility in the center.

name: Engleză cu 1...e5
description: Reversed Sicilian. Black occupies the center.
strategy: White plays a Sicilian with a tempo up.

name: Apărarea Indiană
description: The foundation of all Indian systems. Extremely popular.

name: Apărarea Nimzowitsch
description: Unusual hypermodern defense.

name: Apărarea Scandinavă
description: Black attacks the center immediately. Simple but solid.
strategy: Pawn exchange in the center, rapid development.

name: Apărarea Alekhine
description: Provokes White's pawns to advance, then attacks them.
strategy: Hypermodernism, counterattack on the expanded center.

name: Apărarea Modernă
description: Rapid fianchetto. Pressure on the center from a distance.

name: Apărarea Pirc
description: Hypermodern. Allows White a large center, then attacks it.
strategy: Counterattack from fianchetto, play on the flank.

name: Apărarea Caro-Kann
description: Very solid. Prepares d5 with support.
strategy: Solid structure, good bishop on light squares.

name: Caro-Kann - Varianta Advance
description: White fixes the center. Play on the flanks.

name: Caro-Kann - Varianta Schimb
moves: e4 c6 d4 d5 exd5 cxd5
description: Symmetric structure, positional play.

name: Caro-Kann - Linia Principală
moves: e4 c6 d4 d5 Nc3 dxe4 Nxe4
description: Main theory. Balanced play.
strategy: Harmonious development, bishop on open squares.

name: Apărarea Siciliană
description: The most popular defense to 1.e4. Asymmetric and combative.
strategy: Counterattack on the queenside, tactical play.

name: Siciliana - Gambitul Smith-Morra
description: Pawn gambit for rapid development.

name: Siciliana - Alapin
description: White prepares d4. Avoids heavy theory.
strategy: Stable center, avoiding the Open Sicilian.

name: Siciliana Închisă
description: White avoids opening the center.

name: Siciliana - Varianta Accelerated Dragon
description: Dragon without d6. More flexible.
strategy: Pressure on the h8-a1 diagonal, counterattack.

name: Siciliana - Varianta Nyezhmetdinov-Rossolimo
description: White avoids the Open Sicilian. Very popular.

name: Siciliana - Sveshnikov
moves: e4 c5 Nf3 Nc6 d4 cxd4 Nxd4 Nf6 Nc3 e5
description: Dynamic structure with a hole on d5.

name: Siciliana Dragon
moves: e4 c5 Nf3 d6 d4 cxd4 Nxd4 Nf6 Nc3 g6
description: One of the sharpest variations. Attack and counterattack.
strategy: Devastating fianchetto bishop, attack on the queenside.

name: Siciliana - Varianta Kan
description: Flexible. Can transpose into many variations.

name: Siciliana - Linia Principală
moves: e4 c5 Nf3 d6 d4 cxd4 Nxd4
description: The most critical line. Theory goes very deep.
strategy: Complex play, both players have attacking chances.

name: Siciliana - Varianta Richter-Rauzer
moves: e4 c5 Nf3 d6 d4 cxd4 Nxd4 Nf6 Nc3 Nc6 Bg5
description: Classic attack on the Black bishop.

name: Siciliana Scheveningen
moves: e4 c5 Nf3 d6 d4 cxd4 Nxd4 Nf6 Nc3 e6
description: The e6+d6 structure. Very solid but passive.

name: Siciliana Najdorf
moves: e4 c5 Nf3 d6 d4 cxd4 Nxd4 Nf6 Nc3 a6
description: Favored by world champions (Fischer, Kasparov).

name: Apărarea Franceză
description: Solid, with an asymmetric pawn structure.
strategy: Counterattack on the center with d5, play on the queenside.

name: Franceză - Varianta Schimb
moves: e4 e6 d4 d5 exd5 exd5
description: Symmetric structure, quick equality.

name: Franceză - Varianta Advance
description: White fixes the center. Play on the flanks.
strategy: Space, attack on the kingside. Black attacks the c2-d4 base.

name: Franceză - Varianta Tarrasch
description: Avoids blocking the bishop on c1.

name: Franceză - Varianta Rubinstein
moves: e4 e6 d4 d5 Nc3 dxe4 Nxe4
description: Black resolves center tension.
strategy: Free development, but Black is slightly passive.

name: Franceză - Linia Clasică
moves: e4 e6 d4 d5 Nc3 Nf6
description: Main line. Rich in tactics.
strategy: Black presses on e4, White attacks on the kingside.

name: Franceză - Winawer
moves: e4 e6 d4 d5 Nc3 Bb4
description: The sharpest response. Complex structures.
strategy: The bishop pins the knight, tactical complications.

name: Joc Deschis
description: Classic. Both occupy the center.
strategy: Rapid development, fight for the center.

name: Gambitul Regelui Danez
description: Double pawn sacrifice for development.

name: Gambitul Central
description: The queen comes out early but is centralized.
strategy: Development with tempo on the queen.

name: Jocul Vienez
description: Prepares f4 without exposing the knight.
strategy: Delayed King's Gambit, attack on the f-file.

name: Gambitul Regelui
description: The most romantic classic gambit. Pawn sacrifice on f4.

name: Gambitul Regelui Acceptat
description: Black accepts the challenge.
strategy: White opens lines, Black must return the pawn.

name: Gambitul Regelui - Gambitul Abbazia
description: Modern gambit with d4.

name: Apărarea Letonă
description: Risky gambit for Black. Suicidal at high level.

name: Apărarea Rusă (Petrov)
description: Symmetric and very solid. Favored by top players.

name: Jocul Scoțian
description: Opens the center early. Open game.

name: Scoțianul - Varianta Clasică
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 d4 exd4 Nxd4 Bc5
description: Black develops the active bishop.

name: Jocul Celor Trei Cai
description: Solid but slightly passive.

name: Jocul Celor Patru Cai
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Nc3 Nf6
description: Classic, symmetric, solid.

name: Jocul Italian
description: The oldest studied opening. Elegant.

name: Jocul Italian - Giuoco Piano
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bc4 Bc5
description: \Quiet game\". Harmonious development."

name: Gambitul Evans
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bc4 Bc5 b4
description: Pawn sacrifice for tempo and center.

name: Italian - Linia Clasică
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bc4 Bc5 c3
description: Prepares central d4.
strategy: Strong center, attack on the king.

name: Jocul Italian cu Doi Cai
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bc4 Nf6
description: Black counterattacks aggressively.
strategy: Tactical play, Fried Liver attack on f7.

name: Atacul Fegatello (Fried Liver)
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bc4 Nf6 Ng5 d5 exd5 Nxd5 Nxf7
description: The most spectacular knight sacrifice! Attack on the king.
strategy: Checkmate attack, piece sacrifice on f7.

name: Deschiderea Spaniolă (Ruy López)
description: \The King of Openings\". The most studied."
strategy: Long-term pressure on the center and kingside.

name: Ruy López - Varianta Schliemann
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 f5
description: Aggressive gambit against the Ruy Lopez.

name: Ruy López - Varianta Berlin
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 Nf6
description: \Berlin Wall\". Extremely solid."

name: Ruy López - Varianta Schimb
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 a6 Bxc6
description: Exchange of bishop for knight.

name: Ruy López - Varianta Morphy
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 a6
description: The most popular continuation.

name: Ruy López - Varianta Arkhangelsk
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 a6 Ba4 Nf6 O-O b5 Bb3 Bb7
description: Active bishop on b7, counterattack in the center.

name: Ruy López - Deschidere Deschisă
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 a6 Ba4 Nf6 O-O Nxe4
description: Black captures the e4 pawn immediately.

name: Ruy López - Linia Închisă
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 a6 Ba4 Nf6 O-O Be7
description: Main line. The most studied in chess history.

name: Ruy López - Atacul Marshall
moves: e4 e5 Nf3 Nc6 Bb5 a6 Ba4 Nf6 O-O Be7 Re1 b5 Bb3 O-O c3 d5
description: Frank Marshall's gambit. Spectacular pawn sacrifice.
strategy: Devastating attack on the king, dynamic compensation.

name: Deschiderea Pionului Damei
description: Classic closed game. More strategic than 1.e4.
strategy: Positional control, play on the queenside.

name: Sistemul London
description: Universal system. Easy to learn.

name: Gambitul Damei
description: The most important classic gambit.
strategy: Control over center, pressure on d5.

name: Gambitul Damei - Varianta Chigorin
description: Knight on c6 instead of e6. Unusual but active.

name: Gambitul Damei - Varianta Slav
description: Solid as a wall. The bishop remains free on c8.
strategy: Solid structure, active bishop on light squares.

name: Gambitul Damei Acceptat
description: Black takes the pawn. Must be returned with tempo.

name: Gambitul Damei Refuzat
description: Classic, solid, preferred by elite players.
strategy: Solid defense, problematic bishop on c8.

name: GDR - Varianta Schimb
moves: d4 d5 c4 e6 Nc3 Nf6 cxd5 exd5
description: Symmetric pawn structure. Endgame play.

name: GDR - Linia Clasică
moves: d4 d5 c4 e6 Nc3 Nf6 Nf3 Be7
description: The most traditional line.

name: Semi-Slav
moves: d4 d5 c4 c6 Nc3 Nf6 Nf3 e6
description: Combination of Slav and QGD. Very popular.

name: Semi-Slav - Varianta Meran
moves: d4 d5 c4 c6 Nc3 Nf6 Nf3 e6 e3 Nbd7 Bd3 dxc4 Bxc4 b5
description: Black advances aggressively on the queenside.

name: Apărarea Indiană a Damei
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 e6 Nf3 b6
description: Fianchetto on b7. Controls the long diagonal.
strategy: Control on e4, fluid positional play.

name: Indian Damei - Varianta Petrosian
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 e6 Nf3 b6 a3
description: Prevents Bb4. Very solid.

name: Indian Damei - Varianta Nimzowitsch
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 e6 Nf3 b6 g3
description: Double fianchetto. Battle of the diagonals.

name: Apărarea Nimzo-Indiană
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 e6 Nc3 Bb4
description: One of the most respected defenses. Pins the knight on c3.
strategy: Pressure on e4, doubled pawn structure.

name: Nimzo-Indiană - Varianta Clasică
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 e6 Nc3 Bb4 Qc2
description: Avoids doubled pawns. Prepares e4.
strategy: Expansion in the center, maneuver game.

name: Nimzo-Indiană - Varianta Rubinstein
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 e6 Nc3 Bb4 e3
description: Solid. Accepts doubled pawns for the bishop pair.

name: Apărarea Indiană a Regelui
description: Hypermodern and combative. Favored by Kasparov.

name: KID - Varianta Fianchetto
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 Bg7 Nf3 d6 g3
description: The most positional line against KID.

name: KID - Linia Clasică
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 Bg7 e4 d6 Nf3
description: The most natural development.
strategy: Strong center, both play on opposite flanks.

name: KID - Varianta Averbakh
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 Bg7 e4 d6 Be2 O-O Bg5
description: Aggressive bishop on g5, restricts Black.

name: KID - Varianta Samisch
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 Bg7 e4 d6 f3
description: Massive center construction. Prepares Be3.
strategy: Imposing center, attack on the queenside.

name: KID - Varianta Sämisch cu f5
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 Bg7 e4 d6 f3 O-O Be3 e5
description: Classic battle on opposite flanks.
strategy: White attacks on queenside, Black on kingside.

name: KID - Linia Principală
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 Bg7 e4 d6 Nf3 O-O
description: Base position. From here all theory branches.
strategy: Both have concrete plans on opposite flanks.

name: KID - Varianta Mar del Plata
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 Bg7 e4 d6 Nf3 O-O Be2 e5 O-O Nc6
description: The most famous battle in KID. Two armies attack each other.
strategy: White: c5+d5 on queenside. Black: f5+g4 on kingside.

name: Apărarea Grünfeld
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 g6 Nc3 d5
description: Hypermodern. Black yields the center to attack it.
strategy: Pressure on d4 with the g7 bishop, counterattack.

name: Apărarea Benoni
description: Asymmetric and dynamic. Play on opposite flanks.

name: Benoni Modernă
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 c5 d5 e6
description: Accepts space disadvantage for dynamism.

name: Gambitul Benko
moves: d4 Nf6 c4 c5 d5 b5
description: Pawn sacrifice for queenside pressure.
strategy: Open a and b files, long-term pressure.

name: Deschiderea Trompowsky
description: Aggressive bishop on g5. Avoids mainstream theory.

name: Sistemul Colle
description: Easy to learn system. Pawn pyramid.
strategy: e4 breakthrough, attack on the king.
